query: Какие отрасли наиболее представлены среди клиентов, топ-10?

sol_sql: SELECT dpf.branch_code, dpf.branch_name, COUNT(DISTINCT basn.agreement_id) AS agreement_count, COUNT(DISTINCT dpf.department_core_id) AS department_count, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT basn.agreement_id) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dpf.department_core_id), 0) AS numeric(10,2)) AS avg_agreements_per_department FROM dm_mis.v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn basn JOIN dm_mis.v_department_pc_fed dpf ON basn.dep_core_id = dpf.department_core_id WHERE basn.report_date = DATE '2025-06-30' GROUP BY dpf.branch_code, dpf.branch_name ORDER BY agreement_count DESC LIMIT 5;

query: Проанализируйте динамику ставок для кредитных договоров, у которых в течение последних 30 дней до 2025-11-01 изменилась базовая ставка. Для каждой группы риска выведите название группы риска, количество договоров, среднюю предыдущую маржу, среднюю текущую маржу и среднюю разницу ставок.
sol_sql: SELECT c.risk_group, COUNT(DISTINCT c.agreement_abs_id) AS agreement_count, AVG(r.previos_margin) AS avg_previous_margin, AVG(r.margin) AS avg_current_margin, AVG(r.percent_rate - r.previos_percent_rate) AS avg_rate_change FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract c JOIN dm_mis.v_f_contract_rate_ref r ON c.report_date = r.report_date AND c.agreement_id = r.agreement_id WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01' AND r.date_base_rate >= DATE '2025-11-01' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY c.risk_group ORDER BY agreement_count DESC;
agent_sql: SELECT COALESCE(v_f_entity_status.status_cd, 'Неизвестно') AS "группа_риска", COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract.agreement_id) AS "количество_договоров", AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.previos_margin) AS "средняя_предыдущая_маржа", AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.margin) AS "средняя_текущая_маржа", AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.percent_rate - v_f_contract_rate_ref.previos_percent_rate) AS "средняя_разница_ставок" FROM v_f_contract INNER JOIN v_f_contract_rate_ref ON v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.instrument_id AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.agreement_id AND v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_contract_rate_ref.report_date LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_status ON v_f_contract.contractor_eck_id = v_f_entity_status.entity_id::VARCHAR AND v_f_entity_status.final_date IS NULL WHERE v_f_contract.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01' AND v_f_contract_rate_ref.percent_start_date BETWEEN DATE '2025-10-02' AND DATE '2025-11-01' AND v_f_contract_rate_ref.base_rate IS NOT NULL AND v_f_contract_rate_ref.previos_percent_rate IS NOT NULL AND v_f_contract_rate_ref.fixed_rate = 0 GROUP BY v_f_entity_status.status_cd

query: Найти все актуальные остатки по счетам для сделок РЕПО, которые были заключены в текущем году на текущую отчетную дату. Вывести дату отчета, номер сделки, тип РЕПО, валюту и остаток.
sol_sql: SELECT rest.balance_date, deal.deal_security_nbr AS repo_number, deal.type_repo, rest.volume_element, rest.balance_out, deal.settle_cur_id AS currency FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal ON rest.leg1_deal_security_id = deal.leg1_deal_security_id AND rest.balance_date = deal.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON rest.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND rest.account_id = asn.account_id AND rest.balance_date = asn.balance_date WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deal.trade_dt)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int AND rest.balance_date = DATE '2026-05-04' AND deal.type_repo IN (0, 1) ORDER BY deal.deal_security_nbr;

query: Сделай выборку номеров сделок, типа РЕПО и роли счета по сделкам, исполненным в прошлом месяце. Отфильтровать записи так, чтобы остаток был актуален на дату жизни сделки, результат отсортировать по номеру сделки и роли счета.
sol_sql: SELECT deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number, deal.type_repo AS repo_type, asn.account_core_role_nm AS account_role FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date WHERE deal.leg1_exec_dt >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month')::date AND deal.leg1_exec_dt < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date AND rest.balance_date BETWEEN deal.leg1_exec_dt AND deal.leg2_exec_dt ORDER BY deal.deal_security_nbr, asn.account_core_role_nm;

query: Выведите топ-5 филиалов по коду с наибольшим количеством открытых действующих счетов на дату '2025-11-01'. Для каждого филиала в разрезе допофиса покажите код филиала, название филиала, наименование допофиса, количество счетов, количество уникальных клиентов-владельцев и средний срок действия счетов в днях.
sol_sql: SELECT a.brnch_cd, b.name AS branch_name, d.department_name, COUNT(a.account_id) AS account_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.owner_entity_id) AS unique_clients, AVG(DATE '2025-11-01' - a.open_dt) AS avg_account_age_days FROM dm_mis.v_d_account a JOIN dm_mis.vbranch b ON a.brnch_entity_id = b.id JOIN dm_mis.v_department_pc_fed d ON d.department_core_id = a.dept_entity_id WHERE a.t_datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-11-01 00:00:00' AND a.t_datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-11-02 00:00:00' AND a.open_dt <= DATE '2025-11-01' AND a.close_dt > DATE '2025-11-01' GROUP BY a.brnch_cd, b.name, d.department_name ORDER BY account_count DESC LIMIT 5;
agent_sql:
WITH active_accounts AS (
    SELECT
        a.account_id,
        a.owner_entity_id,
        a.open_dt,
        a.brnch_entity_id,
        a.dept_entity_id,
        b.code AS branch_code,
        b.name AS branch_name,
        d.department_name AS department_name
    FROM "v_d_account" a
    LEFT JOIN "vbranch" b ON a.brnch_entity_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN "v_department_pc_fed" d ON a.dept_entity_id = d.department_core_id
    LEFT JOIN "v_d_entity_psn" p ON a.owner_entity_id = p.entity_core_id
    WHERE a.open_dt <= '2025-11-01'
      AND (a.close_dt IS NULL OR a.close_dt > '2025-11-01')
      AND a.technical_ind = '0'
      AND (p.actual_id = 1 OR p.actual_id IS NULL)
),
branch_stats AS (
    SELECT
        branch_code,
        branch_name,
        department_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS account_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT owner_entity_id) AS client_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE('2025-11-01', open_dt)))::numeric AS avg_days
    FROM active_accounts
    GROUP BY branch_code, branch_name, department_name
),
top_branches AS (
    SELECT branch_code
    FROM branch_stats
    GROUP BY branch_code
    ORDER BY SUM(account_count) DESC
    LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
    bs.branch_code,
    bs.branch_name,
    COALESCE(bs.department_name, 'Не указан') AS department_name,
    bs.account_count,
    bs.client_count,
    ROUND(bs.avg_days, 2) AS avg_days
FROM branch_stats bs
WHERE bs.branch_code IN (SELECT branch_code FROM top_branches)
ORDER BY (SELECT SUM(account_count) FROM branch_stats bs2 WHERE bs2.branch_code = bs.branch_code) DESC,
         bs.branch_code,
         bs.account_count DESC

query: Для каждого филиала и типа платежа за дату 2025-11-01 вывести количество активных кредитных договоров, общую плановую сумму платежей, среднюю процентную ставку по графикам, максимальную дату окончания платежного периода. Показать только записи, где общая сумма платежей превышает 100000, отсортировать по ней по убыванию.
sol_sql: SELECT c.branch_code, s.sched_type_cd, COUNT(DISTINCT c.agreement_abs_id) AS agreement_count, SUM(s.sched_pay_amt) AS total_sched_pay_amt, AVG(s.interest_rate) AS avg_schedule_rate, MAX(s.sched_final_dt) AS max_sched_final_dt FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract c JOIN dm_mis.v_f_agmt_schedule s ON c.report_date = s.report_date AND c.instrument_id = s.instrument_id WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01' GROUP BY c.branch_code, s.sched_type_cd HAVING SUM(s.sched_pay_amt) > 100000 ORDER BY total_sched_pay_amt DESC;
agent_sql:
WITH active_contracts AS (
    SELECT
        fc.agreement_id,
        fc.agreement_nbr,
        fc.short_name
    FROM v_f_contract fc
    WHERE fc.report_date = '2025-11-01'
      AND (fc.fact_final_date IS NULL OR fc.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')
),
contract_branches AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ac.agreement_id,
        vb.name AS branch_name
    FROM active_contracts ac
    LEFT JOIN v_f_contract_account fca ON ac.agreement_id = fca.agreement_id AND fca.report_date = '2025-11-01'
    LEFT JOIN v_d_account vda ON fca.account_core_id = vda.account_id
    LEFT JOIN vbranch vb ON vda.brnch_entity_id = vb.id
),
payment_types AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        fap.agreement_id,
        fap.transaction_type_name
    FROM v_f_agmt_payment fap
    WHERE fap.report_date = '2025-11-01'
),
schedule_agg AS (
    SELECT
        fas.agreement_id,
        SUM(fas.sched_pay_amt) AS total_planned_payment_amount,
        AVG(fas.interest_rate) AS avg_interest_rate,
        MAX(fas.sched_final_dt) AS max_payment_period_end_date
    FROM v_f_agmt_schedule fas
    WHERE fas.report_date = '2025-11-01'
    GROUP BY fas.agreement_id
)
SELECT
    cb.branch_name,
    pt.transaction_type_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ac.agreement_id) AS active_contracts_count,
    sa.total_planned_payment_amount,
    sa.avg_interest_rate,
    sa.max_payment_period_end_date
FROM active_contracts ac
LEFT JOIN contract_branches cb ON ac.agreement_id = cb.agreement_id
LEFT JOIN payment_types pt ON ac.agreement_id = pt.agreement_id
LEFT JOIN schedule_agg sa ON ac.agreement_id = sa.agreement_id
WHERE sa.total_planned_payment_amount IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cb.branch_name, pt.transaction_type_name, sa.total_planned_payment_amount, sa.avg_interest_rate, sa.max_payment_period_end_date
HAVING SUM(sa.total_planned_payment_amount) > 100000
ORDER BY sa.total_planned_payment_amount DESC

query: Найдите все действующие кредитные договоры за 2025-11-01, у которых суммарный остаток по всем связанным ссудным счетам превышает средний остаток по таким счетам в портфеле. Выведите номер договора, краткое наименование клиента, группу риска РВП, количество счетов и суммарный остаток.
sol_sql: SELECT c.agreement_nbr, c.short_name, c.risk_group_rvp, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.account_core_id) AS account_count, SUM(ca.balance_out) AS total_balance_out FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract c JOIN dm_mis.v_f_contract_account ca ON c.agreement_id = ca.agreement_id AND c.report_date = ca.report_date WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01' AND c.fact_final_date >= DATE '2025-11-01' AND ca.account_role_short_name = 'ACCOUNT' GROUP BY c.agreement_nbr, c.short_name, c.risk_group_rvp HAVING SUM(ca.balance_out) > (SELECT AVG(ca2.balance_out) FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract_account ca2 WHERE ca2.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01' AND ca2.account_role_short_name = 'ACCOUNT' AND ca2.balance_out > 0) ORDER BY total_balance_out DESC LIMIT 20;
agent_sql:
WITH contract_od_accounts AS (
    SELECT
        fc.report_date,
        fc.instrument_id,
        fc.agreement_id,
        fc.agreement_nbr,
        fc.short_name AS contract_short_name,
        fc.contractor_abs_id,
        fc.start_date,
        fc.planned_final_date,
        fc.fact_final_date,
        fco.account_core_id,
        fco.account_balance_type_cd,
        var.account_role_id,
        var.short_name AS role_short_name,
        var.long_name AS role_long_name,
        var.account_role_desc
    FROM v_f_contract fc
    INNER JOIN v_f_contract_od fco
        ON fc.report_date = fco.report_date
        AND fc.instrument_id = fco.instrument_id
        AND fc.agreement_id = fco.agreement_id
    INNER JOIN v_account_role var
        ON fco.account_role_id = var.account_role_id
    WHERE fc.report_date = '2025-11-01'
        AND fc.start_date <= '2025-11-01'
        AND (fc.fact_final_date IS NULL OR fc.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')
        AND (fc.planned_final_date IS NULL OR fc.planned_final_date >= '2025-11-01')
        AND fco.report_date = '2025-11-01'
        AND (
            var.short_name = 'OD'
            OR var.long_name ILIKE '%overdraft%'
            OR var.long_name ILIKE '%од%'
            OR var.account_role_desc ILIKE '%ссудн%'
            OR fco.account_balance_type_cd = 'OD'
        )
),
account_rests AS (
    SELECT
        far.account_id,
        far.balance_out,
        far.report_date
    FROM v_f_account_rest far
    WHERE far.report_date = '2025-11-01'
),
contract_sums AS (
    SELECT
        coa.agreement_id,
        coa.instrument_id,
        coa.agreement_nbr,
        coa.contract_short_name,
        coa.contractor_abs_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT coa.account_core_id) AS accounts_count,
        COALESCE(SUM(ar.balance_out), 0::numeric) AS total_balance
    FROM contract_od_accounts coa
    LEFT JOIN account_rests ar
        ON coa.account_core_id = ar.account_id
    GROUP BY
        coa.agreement_id,
        coa.instrument_id,
        coa.agreement_nbr,
        coa.contract_short_name,
        coa.contractor_abs_id
),
portfolio_avg AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(cs.total_balance) AS avg_portfolio_balance
    FROM contract_sums cs
)
SELECT
    cs.agreement_nbr AS "Номер договора",
    deo.short_name AS "Краткое наименование клиента",
    COALESCE(vfc.status_cd, 'Н/Д') AS "Группа риска РВП",
    cs.accounts_count AS "Количество счетов",
    cs.total_balance AS "Суммарный остаток"
FROM contract_sums cs
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org deo
    ON cs.contractor_abs_id = deo.entity_core_id::varchar
LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_status vfc
    ON deo.entity_core_id = vfc.entity_id
    AND vfc.start_date <= '2025-11-01'
    AND (vfc.final_date IS NULL OR vfc.final_date >= '2025-11-01')
CROSS JOIN portfolio_avg pa
WHERE cs.total_balance > pa.avg_portfolio_balance
    AND cs.total_balance > 0
ORDER BY cs.total_balance DESC

query: Для всех активных сделок РЕПО показать агрегированную информацию: общее количество сделок и договоров, суммарные остатки, среднюю ставку и самую позднюю дату исполнения первой ноги.
sol_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deal.deal_security_nbr) AS total_active_deals, COUNT(DISTINCT contract.agreement_nbr) AS total_active_contracts, SUM(rest.balance_out) AS total_balance_out, AVG(rate.rate) AS average_interest_rate, MAX(deal.leg1_exec_dt) AS latest_first_leg_date FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal JOIN dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract ON deal.agreement_id = contract.agreement_id AND deal.balance_date = contract.balance_date LEFT JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_rate rate ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = rate.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = rate.balance_date AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN rate.open_dt AND rate.fact_close_dt JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date WHERE deal.balance_date = DATE '2026-05-04' AND rest.final_date >= DATE '2026-05-04';

query: Для всех сделок РЕПО, открытых в текущем году, показать агрегированную информацию по типам РЕПО: общее количество сделок, среднюю и максимальную суммы остатков, средний срок до исполнения первой ноги и количество уникальных договоров.
sol_sql: SELECT deal.type_repo, COUNT(DISTINCT deal.deal_security_nbr) AS total_deals, COUNT(DISTINCT contract.agreement_nbr) AS unique_contracts_count, CAST(AVG(rest.balance_out) AS numeric(15,2)) AS avg_balance_amount, MAX(rest.balance_out) AS max_balance_amount, AVG(deal.leg1_exec_dt - CURRENT_DATE) AS avg_days_to_first_leg FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal JOIN dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract ON deal.agreement_id = contract.agreement_id AND deal.balance_date = contract.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date WHERE deal.balance_date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM contract.open_dt)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int AND rest.balance_out > 0 GROUP BY deal.type_repo HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT deal.deal_security_nbr) > 0 ORDER BY total_deals DESC, avg_balance_amount DESC;

query: Показать топ-5 сделок с наибольшими остатками на сегодня. Вывести номер сделки, тип РЕПО, остаток, валюту и текущую ставку.
sol_sql: SELECT deal.deal_security_nbr, deal.type_repo, rest.balance_out, rest.currency_id, rate.rate FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal JOIN dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract ON deal.agreement_id = contract.agreement_id AND deal.balance_date = contract.balance_date LEFT JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_rate rate ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = rate.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = rate.balance_date AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN rate.open_dt AND rate.fact_close_dt JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date WHERE deal.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND rest.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND contract.fact_close_dt >= CURRENT_DATE AND rest.balance_out > 0 ORDER BY rest.balance_out DESC LIMIT 5;
agent_sql: SELECT d.deal_security_nbr AS "Номер сделки", CASE d.type_repo WHEN 1 THEN 'РЕПО' WHEN 2 THEN 'Обратное РЕПО' ELSE 'Тип ' || d.type_repo::text END AS "Тип РЕПО", SUM(r.balance_out) AS "Остаток", f.code AS "Валюта", rt.rate AS "Текущая ставка" FROM v_f_repo_deal d INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest r ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = r.leg1_deal_security_id LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_rate rt ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = rt.leg1_deal_security_id LEFT JOIN vfund f ON r.currency_id = f.id WHERE d.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND r.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND rt.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND (rt.fact_close_dt IS NULL OR rt.fact_close_dt > CURRENT_DATE) AND (r.final_date IS NULL OR r.final_date > CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY d.deal_security_nbr, d.type_repo, f.code, rt.rate ORDER BY SUM(r.balance_out) DESC LIMIT 5

query: Выведите для каждого клиента ID клиента в CORE, его глобальный уникальный идентификатор клиента, текущий статус, количество смен статуса за всю историю и ранг клиента по количеству смен статуса в рамках его типа.

sol_sql: WITH dog_cnt AS (SELECT entity_core_id, COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS dog_count FROM dm_mis.v_f_broker_agmt_client WHERE report_date = DATE '2025-12-31' AND end_date >= DATE '2025-12-31' GROUP BY entity_core_id) SELECT ep.gender_cd AS gender, COUNT(DISTINCT ba.agreement_id) AS agreement_count, COUNT(DISTINCT ep.entity_core_id) AS client_count, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(DATE '2025-12-31', ep.birth_dt))), 2) AS avg_age, MAX(dog_cnt.dog_count) AS max_agreements_per_client FROM dm_mis.v_d_broker_agmt ba JOIN dm_mis.v_f_broker_agmt_client bac ON ba.agreement_id = bac.agreement_id AND ba.report_date = bac.report_date JOIN dm_mis.v_d_entity_psn ep ON bac.entity_core_id = ep.entity_core_id JOIN dog_cnt ON ep.entity_core_id = dog_cnt.entity_core_id WHERE ba.report_date = DATE '2025-12-31' AND bac.end_date >= DATE '2025-12-31' GROUP BY ep.gender_cd ORDER BY client_count DESC, ep.gender_cd;

INNER JOIN client_demographics d ON ac.entity_core_id = d.entity_core_id
GROUP BY COALESCE(d.gender_cd, 'Неизвестно')

query: Сколько клиентов по каждому типу (ЮЛ, ИП, Банки) и их доля в процентах?
sol_sql: WITH type_counts AS (SELECT CASE entity_type WHEN 0 THEN 'Юридическое лицо' WHEN 1 THEN 'Банк' WHEN 2 THEN 'Индивидуальный предприниматель' WHEN 3 THEN 'Прочие' ELSE 'Неизвестно' END AS client_type, COUNT(*) AS client_count FROM dm_mis.v_d_entity_org GROUP BY entity_type) SELECT client_type, client_count, ROUND(client_count * 100.0 / SUM(client_count) OVER (), 2) AS percentage FROM type_counts ORDER BY client_count DESC, client_type;
agent_sql:
WITH client_classification AS (
    SELECT
        p.entity_core_id,
        CASE
            WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NOT NULL AND (o.okopf IN ('12247', '12267') OR o.okved LIKE '64.19%' OR o.okved LIKE '64.20%') THEN 'Банки'
            WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'ЮЛ'
            WHEN p.entity_type = 2 THEN 'ИП'
            WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NULL AND p.entity_type = 1 THEN 'Физлицо'
            WHEN r.agreement_id IS NOT NULL AND (r.dog_type = 'BANK' OR r.prdct_subtype_cd = 'BANK') THEN 'Банки'
            ELSE 'Неопределено'
        END AS client_type
    FROM "v_d_entity_psn" p
    LEFT JOIN "v_d_entity_org" o ON p.entity_core_id = o.entity_core_id
    LEFT JOIN "rko_contracts" r ON p.entity_core_id = r.entity_id
    WHERE p.actual_id = 1
      AND (p.date_actual IS NULL OR p.date_actual >= CURRENT_DATE)
),
filtered_clients AS (
    SELECT entity_core_id, client_type
    FROM client_classification
    WHERE client_type IN ('ЮЛ', 'ИП', 'Банки')
),
client_counts AS (
    SELECT
        client_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS client_count
    FROM filtered_clients
    GROUP BY client_type
)
SELECT
    client_type AS "Тип клиента",
    client_count AS "Количество",
    (client_count::numeric * 100.0 / SUM(client_count::numeric) OVER ()) AS "Доля, %"
FROM client_counts
ORDER BY client_count DESC

query: Для каждого типа клиента выведите количество клиентов, средний возраст в годах и страну регистрации, где больше всего клиентов этого типа.
sol_sql: WITH type_stats AS (SELECT psn.entity_type, cntry.reg_country_iso_cd, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, psn.birth_dt))) AS avg_age FROM dm_mis.v_d_entity_psn psn JOIN dm_mis.v_f_entity_country cntry ON psn.entity_core_id = cntry.entity_id JOIN dm_mis.v_f_entity_status stat ON psn.entity_core_id = stat.entity_id WHERE psn.birth_dt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY psn.entity_type, cntry.reg_country_iso_cd), ranked_countries AS (SELECT entity_type, reg_country_iso_cd, cnt, avg_age, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_type ORDER BY cnt DESC, reg_country_iso_cd) AS rn FROM type_stats) SELECT entity_type, SUM(cnt) AS total_clients, AVG(avg_age) AS average_age, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN reg_country_iso_cd END) AS top_country FROM ranked_countries GROUP BY entity_type ORDER BY entity_type;
agent_sql:
WITH client_base AS (
    SELECT
        p.entity_core_id,
        p.entity_type,
        p.birth_dt,
        c.id AS country_id,
        c.name AS country_name
    FROM v_d_entity_psn p
    LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_country fc ON p.entity_core_id = fc.entity_id
        AND (fc.final_date IS NULL OR fc.final_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
    LEFT JOIN vcountry c ON fc.reg_country_id = c.id
    WHERE p.birth_dt IS NOT NULL
        AND p.actual_id = 1
),
client_age AS (
    SELECT
        entity_core_id,
        entity_type,
        country_id,
        country_name,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, birth_dt)) AS age_years
    FROM client_base
),
stats_by_country AS (
    SELECT
        entity_type,
        country_id,
        country_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS cnt,
        AVG(age_years) AS avg_age
    FROM client_age
    GROUP BY entity_type, country_id, country_name
),
max_country AS (
    SELECT
        entity_type,
        country_name AS top_country,
        cnt AS top_country_cnt,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_type ORDER BY cnt DESC, country_name) AS rn
    FROM stats_by_country
    WHERE country_id IS NOT NULL
),
type_stats AS (
    SELECT
        entity_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS client_count,
        AVG(age_years)::numeric(10,2) AS avg_age_years
    FROM client_age
    GROUP BY entity_type
)
SELECT
    ts.entity_type,
    ts.client_count,
    ts.avg_age_years,
    mc.top_country
FROM type_stats ts
LEFT JOIN max_country mc ON ts.entity_type = mc.entity_type AND mc.rn = 1
ORDER BY ts.client_count DESC

query: Для каждого клиента определите миграционный профиль: ID клиента в CORE, количество уникальных стран из REG, FACT, TAX, ACTV, флаг международности и процент клиентов в его типе с таким же или более сложным профилем.
sol_sql: WITH client_countries AS (SELECT psn.entity_core_id, psn.entity_type, COUNT(DISTINCT country_code) AS unique_countries_count, CASE WHEN cntry.reg_country_iso_cd <> cntry.tax_country_iso_cd THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_international FROM dm_mis.v_d_entity_psn psn JOIN dm_mis.v_f_entity_country cntry ON psn.entity_core_id = cntry.entity_id CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES (cntry.reg_country_iso_cd), (cntry.fact_country_iso_cd), (cntry.tax_country_iso_cd), (cntry.actv_country_id::text)) AS country_values(country_code) GROUP BY psn.entity_core_id, psn.entity_type, cntry.reg_country_iso_cd, cntry.tax_country_iso_cd) SELECT entity_core_id, entity_type, unique_countries_count, is_international, ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_type ORDER BY unique_countries_count DESC) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS more_complex_profile_percent FROM client_countries ORDER BY unique_countries_count DESC;

query: Найти сделки, где произошло значительное изменение ставки больше 20 процентов и одновременно изменились остатки на счетах за последние 6 месяцев более чем на 1000. Вывести номер сделки, номер договора, тип РЕПО, процент изменения ставки и среднее значение изменения остатков.
sol_sql: WITH rate_changes AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, balance_date, rate, open_dt, LAG(rate) OVER (PARTITION BY leg1_deal_security_id ORDER BY open_dt) AS prev_rate FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_rate WHERE balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'), balance_changes AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, balance_date, balance_out, LAG(balance_out) OVER (PARTITION BY leg1_deal_security_id ORDER BY balance_date) AS prev_balance FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest WHERE balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months') SELECT deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number, contract.agreement_nbr AS contract_number, deal.type_repo AS repo_type, CAST(((rc.rate - rc.prev_rate) * 100.0 / rc.prev_rate) AS numeric(10,2)) AS rate_change_percent, CAST(AVG(ABS(bc.balance_out - bc.prev_balance)) AS numeric(15,2)) AS avg_balance_change FROM rate_changes rc JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal ON rc.leg1_deal_security_id = deal.leg1_deal_security_id JOIN dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract ON deal.agreement_id = contract.agreement_id AND deal.balance_date = contract.balance_date JOIN balance_changes bc ON rc.leg1_deal_security_id = bc.leg1_deal_security_id WHERE rc.prev_rate IS NOT NULL AND bc.prev_balance IS NOT NULL AND ABS((rc.rate - rc.prev_rate) / rc.prev_rate) > 0.2 AND ABS(bc.balance_out - bc.prev_balance) > 1000 GROUP BY deal.deal_security_nbr, contract.agreement_nbr, deal.type_repo, rc.rate, rc.prev_rate ORDER BY rate_change_percent DESC;
agent_sql: SELECT d.leg1_deal_security_id AS deal_id, d.deal_security_nbr AS deal_nbr, d.product_cd AS repo_type, ((d.sell_amount - d.buy_amount) / NULLIF(d.sell_amount, 0) * 100)::numeric(32, 2) AS rate_change_pct, AVG(ABS(r.balance_out))::numeric(32, 2) AS avg_balance_change FROM v_f_repo_deal d JOIN v_f_repo_rate rt ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = rt.leg1_deal_security_id AND d.balance_date = rt.balance_date JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest r ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = r.leg1_deal_security_id AND d.balance_date = r.balance_date WHERE d.balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' AND d.sell_amount > 0 AND ABS((d.sell_amount - d.buy_amount) / NULLIF(d.sell_amount, 0) * 100) > 20 AND ABS(r.balance_out) > 1000 GROUP BY d.leg1_deal_security_id, d.deal_security_nbr, d.product_cd, d.sell_amount, d.buy_amount HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

query: Показать топ-10 договоров по суммарному остатку на счетах с РЕПО-сделками, отсортированных по убыванию остатка, с указанием рейтинга договора.
sol_sql: WITH contract_balances AS (SELECT contract.agreement_nbr AS contract_number, contract.open_dt AS contract_open_date, contract.fact_close_dt AS contract_close_date, SUM(rest.balance_out) AS total_contract_balance, COUNT(DISTINCT deal.deal_security_nbr) AS deals_count FROM dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal ON contract.agreement_id = deal.agreement_id AND contract.balance_date = deal.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_rate rate ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = rate.leg1_deal_security_id AND deal.balance_date = rate.balance_date WHERE contract.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE AND rest.balance_out > 0 AND rate.rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY contract.agreement_nbr, contract.open_dt, contract.fact_close_dt) SELECT contract_number, total_contract_balance, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_contract_balance DESC) AS balance_rank FROM contract_balances ORDER BY balance_rank LIMIT 10;
agent_sql: SELECT v_f_repo_deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number, v_f_repo_deal.agreement_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.trade_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.sell_amount, v_f_repo_deal.buy_amount, v_f_repo_deal.type_repo, COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id) AS accounts_count, COALESCE(SUM(v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_out), 0) AS total_balance, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_out), 0) DESC) AS rating FROM v_f_repo_deal INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn ON v_f_repo_deal.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.start_date <= v_f_repo_deal.balance_date AND (v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date IS NULL OR v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date >= v_f_repo_deal.balance_date) LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.leg1_deal_security_id AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.account_id AND v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_date = v_f_repo_deal.balance_date LEFT JOIN v_d_account ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_d_account.account_id LEFT JOIN v_account_role ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_core_role_id = v_account_role.account_role_id WHERE v_f_repo_deal.balance_date = (SELECT MAX(balance_date) FROM v_f_repo_deal) GROUP BY v_f_repo_deal.deal_security_nbr, v_f_repo_deal.agreement_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.trade_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.sell_amount, v_f_repo_deal.buy_amount, v_f_repo_deal.type_repo, v_f_repo_deal.balance_date ORDER BY total_balance DESC LIMIT 10
